ideation: This animation sequence depicts the nurturing and gentle growth of a heart, representing the feeling of love blossoming.  The movement will be slow and deliberate, focusing on the arms' gentle upward and outward expansion to mirror the heart's growth.  The robot's hands will not directly interact with the heart, but the arms' position will imply a protective and loving embrace.  Frame 1 will start with arms at the sides, frame 2 will show arms gently rising, frame 3 will have the arms expanding outward and slightly upward, and frame 4 will have the arms reaching their peak of expansion.  Frame 5 will return to a relaxed posture, suggesting that the heart is now fully grown and cherished.

frames.beat: arms rest at sides, a quiet beginning
arms gently lift, like a budding feeling
arms open wide, love starts to blossom
arms reach out, embracing the growing heart
arms settle, cherishing the love within
